## Summary

Describe the subtitle parser, profile, rule, cleanup, conversion, test, or documentation change.

## Behavior

- Previous behavior:
- New behavior:
- Compatibility impact:

## Verification

- [ ] Added valid and invalid subtitle fixtures
- [ ] Ran `python -m unittest -v`
- [ ] Checked SRT behavior when relevant
- [ ] Checked WebVTT behavior when relevant
- [ ] Checked strict parsing when relevant
- [ ] Checked rendering or format conversion when relevant
- [ ] Used synthetic subtitle text

## Safety and review

- [ ] Timing values remain reviewable
- [ ] Cleanup remains deterministic and optional
- [ ] Finding type and level are documented
- [ ] Profile changes include a version or compatibility note

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README or rule documentation
- [ ] Updated the review workflow when needed
- [ ] Recorded user-visible changes

## Reviewer notes

List limitations, edge cases, and follow-up work.
